entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Sorghum bicolor, a crop plant studied for nitrogen fixation in the rhizosphere

entities.name: MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum americanum, a crop plant studied for nitrogen fixation in the rhizosphere

entities.name: N2-FIXING BACTERIA
entities.description: Bacteria capable of fixing atmospheric nitrogen used to inoculate plant root systems

entities.name: 15N2-ENRICHED ATMOSPHERE
entities.description: An atmosphere enriched with the 15N isotope of nitrogen used to track nitrogen fixation

entities.name: N2-FIXATION
entities.description: The biological process of converting atmospheric nitrogen into a usable form for plants

entities.name: RHIZOSPHERE
entities.description: The soil region surrounding plant roots where nitrogen fixation occurs

entities.name: SAND/FARMYARD MANURE MEDIUM
entities.description: A growth medium composed of sand and farmyard manure used for sorghum plants

entities.name: SOIL
entities.description: The natural growth medium used for both sorghum and millet plants

entities.name: ACETYLENE REDUCTION ASSAY
entities.description: A method used to measure nitrogenase activity by detecting ethylene production

entities.name: ETHYLENE CONCENTRATION
entities.description: The level of ethylene produced during the acetylene reduction assay as an indicator of nitrogen fixation
